task_description: Politely invite a colleague to join you for lunch while respecting their time and preferences.

example.title: 午餐邀约
example.scenario: You want to build rapport with a new teammate and casually invite them to lunch during work hours.

messages.english: Hey [Name], I'm planning to grab lunch around 12:30 — would you like to join me? No pressure at all if you're busy or prefer to eat separately!
messages.chinese: 嘿[姓名]，我打算12:30左右去吃午饭——你愿意一起来吗？如果你忙或者更喜欢自己用餐，完全没关系！

messages.userPrompt: 我想和同事一起吃午饭，但不想让他觉得有压力。

reference.answer: I'd love to have lunch with you sometime — just let me know what works for your schedule!

messages.english: That sounds great! How about tomorrow at noon? Or feel free to suggest another time that fits better.
messages.chinese: 太好了！明天中午怎么样？或者你也可以推荐一个更适合你的时间。

messages.userPrompt: 好的，那我们明天中午见！

reference.answer: Perfect — see you tomorrow at noon! 😊
